calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-02-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Dawn Deering Summitt, individually and dba Deering Cleaners.
Default was entered against defendant on August 12, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 12, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at the default prove-up hearing was filed on September 23, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant Dawn Deering Summitt, individually and dba Deering Clearners as follows:

Damages/Principal - $30,511.24.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,086.86.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $410.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $34,508.04.

It is further ordered that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the following leased equipment: one Unipress Single Buck Rotary; one Trap Set 34880-00; one 7.5HP Whisper Jet Blower; one Stainless Steel Return Tank, 3/4 HP Pump, 115V/1; one 1/2" Air Cooled After Cooler; one Fulton Edge 15HP Boiler.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than Monday, October 6, 2008.
